input.headline: Philippines sentences 'Chinese spy mayor' to life in jail

raw.headline: Philippines sentences 'Chinese spy mayor' to life in jail

winner: A Philippine court has sentenced a mayoral pigeon to fly with a GPS tracker for life.

candidates.text: Why was the Chinese spy mayor a fan of mazes? Because he couldn't resist getting lost in Philippines!
